data.body: Investigation RESULT: ROOT_CAUSE: 3 compounding bottlenecks — config-paths.sh spawns 7 subprocesses via read-config.sh, merge-mode iterates per-file to build pathspec arrays, and compute-diff-hash is invoked 2+ times per commit. CONFIDENCE: high. FIX: (1) Cache config-paths.sh results, (2) optimize merge-mode diff, (3) add cross-hook hash caching.
